Model #2: Linear(In: 11, Out: 32) -> ReLU -> Linear(In: 32, Out: 64) -> RelU -> Linear(In: 64, Out: 1)

Model #3: LayerNorm(Normalized Shape: 11) -> Linear (In: 11, Out: 16) -> ReLU -> Linear(In: 16, Out: 8) -> ReLU -> Linear(In: 8, Out: 1)
